Tender - Ref. Bid Number: GEM/2026/B/7319588, Dated: 05-03-2026 
 
SUB: Manufacturer’s Authorization Form  
 
Dear Sir, 
We Acer India Pvt. Ltd, one of the largest OEM of Desktop, Laptop, Server, TFT, etc, having registered 
office at Embassy Heights, 6th Floor, No 13 Magrath Road, Bangalore 560025 and Regional Office at 
Office No2, 5th Floor, Tower II, PS Srijan Corporate Park, Sector V, Salt Lake, Kolkata 700091, do 
hereby authorize: 
 
TECHNOBRAINIACS SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED 
P-122, DAKSHINEE CO-OPERATIVE HOUSING SOCIETY LIMITED Dhapa South 24 Parganas West 
Bengal India 700105 
 
to quote and supply Acer brand of product. We will provide standard warranty support as standard 
Terms and conditions of ACER. 
 
This authorization is valid for the above mentioned tender only. 
 
Please feel free to contact undersign for any clarification. 
 
Thanking You, 
 
Yours Truly 
For Acer India Pvt. Ltd. 
 
 
 
Dipankar Chatterjee 
Senior Manager Sales  
Mb: +91 8240818802, Email:  dipankar.chatterjee@acer.com

Yes 
6. OEM must support to re-install the operating system as 
and when required and bring the Desktop Computer back to 
its original factory condition as configured by OEM 
Yes 
7. OEM service center(s) must have been operational in West 
Bengal at least six months prior to the tender publication 
date. The bidder shall submit relevant supporting 
documents as evidence. 
Yes 
8. Indian Oil, Haldia Refinery will carry out an acceptance 
test of the hardware before installation. In case of any 
discrepancy observed during the Acceptance Test IOCL has 
the right to reject the entire material supplied. All the 
licenses required (if any) for mentioned specifications/ 
features/ functionality must be available from day one. 
Yes 
9.The supplied Desktop PC shall be under comprehensive 
on-site warranty for a period of 3 (Three)years from the date 
of acceptance. Validity of PBG shall be for 3 years. 
Yes

--- Page 5 ---
10.The vendor must provide  installation at site, support and 
troubleshoot (if any) without any extra cost. 
Yes 
11. All the technical details  to be clearly mentioned in the 
offer with the technical brochures / literature as provided by 
OEM 
Yes 
12. The supplied Desktop PC shall contain pre-loaded Latest 
Version of  Open Office. 
Yes (Open Office 
pre-loaded) 
13. During the installation of the PCs at users’ location, 
bidder shall be responsible for users’ data transfer from their 
old hardware to the new PCs . Bidder shall be responsible for 
loading softwares like  PDF Reader in all the PCs supplied at 
the users’ location during installation. 
Yes 
14.Bidder shall submit a Bid-Specific Manufacturer 
Authorization Form (MAF) issued by the OEM on OEM’s 
letterhead, duly signed and stamped, confirming compliance 
with the technical specifications. The MAF (or its annexure) 
must certify the following:- 
1) Genuineness of the materials 
2) Factory pre-loaded genuine Windows 11 Home 
3) The absence of malicious code 
4) Spare support shall be Min. 5 yrs. from the date of 
installation 
5) confirmation of  back-to-back warranty and support for 
the offered items along with the tender documents. 
Yes 
15.The procurement of 473 PCs is intended for distribution 
of 1 PC per school  in East Medinipur, West Bengal. 
Installation and  three-year warranty coverage  for these PCs 
shall be provided at the respective schools. 
Yes 
16. Each Desktop PC shall be supplied with one Pendrive and 
one Mouse Pad from Day One. The Pendrive shall have a 
minimum capacity of 32 GB, support USB 3.0 and contain 
Windows OpenOffice and other required software such as a 
PDF Reader. The Mouse Pad shall have customized printing 
as per IOCL’s requirements. The content for printing shall be 
shared with the L1 bidder. IOCL Logo must be prominantly 
and permanently printed/embossed/metal fitted on CPU 
and Monitored. The content for Logo shall be shared with 
the L1 bidder. 
Yes (Bidder scope) 
 
 
Thanking You, 
 
Yours Truly 
For Acer India Pvt. Ltd.

Unleash Your Creativity and Enhance Productivity 
The perfect blend of style, performance, and security for your business needs. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Veriton Mini Tower/SFF 
Up to AMD Ryzen™ 7 8700G with AMD Ryzen AI® Processor 
Up to 4 TB M.2 2280 PCIe® NVMe™ M.2 SSD 
 
Wi-Fi 6E Connectivity 
Scalable Performance, Built for Business 
The Veriton 2000 AMD Desktop delivers reliable, business class desktops with up to AMD Ryzen™ 7 8700G with 
AMD Ryzen AI® Processor, enhanced security, and flexible manageability to support growing business needs.

About Acer 
Founded in 1976, Acer is one of the world's top ICT companies with a presence in more than 160 countries. As Acer evolves with the industry and changing lifestyles, it is focused on enabling a world where hardware, software and services 
will fuse with one another, creating ecosystems and opening up new possibilities for consumers and businesses alike. Acer's 7,500 employees are dedicated to the research, design, marketing, sale, and support of products and solutions 
that break barriers between people and technology. Please visit www.acer.com for more information.

5. 
1 GB is 1 billion bytes. Actual formatted capacity is less and may vary depending on preloaded materials and operating environment. Recovery Management uses a portion of the stated hard disk capacity as dedicated 
backup space.

Date: 21.03.2026 
 
To  
 
Ministry Of Petroleum And Natural Gas, 
Indian Oil Corporation Limited,  
MATERIALS PURCHASE DEPARTMENT,  
IOCL HALDIA REFINERY, HALDIA, 
Pin. - 721606 
 
Tender - Ref. Bid Number: GEM/2026/B/7319588, Dated: 05-03-2026 
 
Subject: Confirmation of Compliance with Tender Requirements 
 
Dear Sir, 
 
Due to the non-availability of 14th Generation or AMD 8000 series products on the GeM portal, 
we had initially aligned with the closest available option using the link provided below: 
https://mkp.gem.gov.in/entry-mid-level-desktop-computer/r3-5300g-win-11-home-
16gb-21-5/p-5116877-82870541405-cat.html 
 
However, we would like to confirm that we will proceed strictly in accordance with the tender 
compliance requirements. 
 
We kindly request you to take note of the above. 
 
Thanking You, 
 
Yours Truly 
For Acer India Pvt. Ltd. 
 
 
 
Dipankar Chatterjee 
Sr. Manager Sales  
Mb: +91 8240818802, Email:  dipankar.chatterjee@acer.com
